hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | xargs -I {} sh -c 'case "{}" in *.py) uv run ruff format "{}" 2>/dev/null && uv run ruff check "{}" --fix 2>/dev/null;; esac; exit 0'

if [ -n "$CLAUDE_CODE_REMOTE_ENVIRONMENT_TYPE" ]; then git config --local user.name 'Vincent' 2>/dev/null; git config --local user.email 'vincent.lamy.33@gmail.com' 2>/dev/null; git config --local commit.gpgsign false 2>/dev/null; command -v pre-commit >/dev/null 2>&1 && pre-commit install --install-hooks 2>/dev/null || true; echo '>>> Claude Code remote: git identity set to Vincent + pre-commit hooks installed' >&2; fi; exit 0

grep -q 'first_session: true' .meta/PILOT.md 2>/dev/null && echo '>>> FIRST SESSION DETECTED — Welcome! Read PILOT.md for project overview and available skills.' || cat .meta/PILOT.md 2>/dev/null | head -30 || true
